title: Elections 2026 LIVE: BJP, EC tried to invalidate my candidature in Bhabanipur, says Mamata at poll rally
description: Elections 2026 LIVE updates: West Bengal chief minister Mamata Banerjee on Saturday alleged that the BJP, with support from the Election Commission, tried to cancel her candidature from the Bhabanipur seat in south Kolkata by attempting to file false cases against her.
